# Action Kernel

Action Kernel copy-first curated block.

Curated minimal projection derived from ../agent-native/packages/core/src/action.ts (@agent-native/core@0.79.19).

## Copy instructions

Run `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/action test` and `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/action typecheck`, then copy the files under `src/` into your app.

## Caveats

- Audit attachment is disabled in the copy-first projection; wire durable audit logging in the host app if needed.

## When not to use

- Do not use when you want the full Agent Native runtime, audit pipeline, or automatic action discovery.
